sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to shine. Jerem. 5:28 , שָֽׁמְנוּ עָֽשְׁתוּ “they are fat (and) shine;” as the skin shines with fatness.

(2) to make shining, to fabricate, to form. Comp. חָלַק. See the derivatives עָשֹׁות , עֶשֶׁת . From the idea of forming-

(3) it is applied to the mind which forms any thing in thought.

Hithpael, to recall to mind, recogito (as well given by the Vulg.), followed by לְ Jon 1:6. See the Chald., and the derived nouns, עֶשְׁתֹּון, עַשְׁתּוּת.
